title: PsiValueSchedule
description: PsiValueSchedule: A thermal bridge between two thermal elements of the dwelling.

Type.description: The thermal bridge type reference according to Table K1 in SAP 2012.

ThermalBridgeName.description: The length of the thermal bridge.

PsiValue.description: The psi-value (heat loss per linear metre) to be applied to the thermal bridge.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
